headline: Barbados first-baseline rotation confirmation. Composite 62.5 sustained. Established band. Caribbean small island state with strong democratic institutions, active climate-justice diplomatic posture (PM Mottley's Bridgetown Initiative for international climate finance reform), and republic transition completed November 2021. Continued engagement with international human rights mechanisms. No active negative news in window. First-baseline established.
key_evidence: Strong democratic institutions; republic transition completed November 2021.
Active climate-justice diplomatic posture: PM Mia Mottley's Bridgetown Initiative for international climate finance reform.
Continued engagement with international human rights mechanisms (UPR, treaty body reviews).
Tourism-dependent SIDS economy creates climate-vulnerability driver of compassion-relevant policy.
No active negative news in window.

scoring_rationale.EQU: 3 first-baseline. LGBTQI+ rights gaps exist but trajectory is positive (2022 court ruling decriminalizing same-sex relationships).
scoring_rationale.BND: 4 first-baseline. Strong international cooperation posture exemplified by Bridgetown Initiative.
scoring_rationale.INT: 3.5 first-baseline. Stated commitments well-aligned with diplomatic action.

math_check.validator_check: Exact reconstruction; first-baseline confirmation; Established band sustained.

negativeSignals: Tourism economic dependency creates climate vulnerability; LGBTQI+ rights gaps in remaining legal architecture.
positiveSignals: Bridgetown Initiative climate diplomacy; republic transition completed; democratic institution strength; HR mechanism engagement.
sector_context: Barbados is the leading Caribbean SIDS contributor to global climate-justice diplomacy. First-baseline establishment confirms Established band classification.
open_actions_carried: Watch: Bridgetown Initiative implementation progress at COP cycle
Watch: any climate-disaster compassion-relevant response event
